stateModel: committed event plus exact event/application working head

commandId.description: Stable idempotency identity. Reuse it for an uncertain retry.

items.description: Change whose live result must be handled first.
Bounded preview of incorporated existing changes.
Bounded preview of integration decisions authored here.

repositoryId.description: Source repository at the exact source state.

integratesEventId.description: Optional source for a zero-change integration; when decisions exist, the parent is derived and this value may only confirm it.

uri.description: Canonical credential-free external source identity; never a host checkout path.

repositoryId.description: Existing repository identity, when replacing its snapshot.

complete.description: True when no effective source change still requires a decision.

remainingChangeCount.description: Effective source changes still requiring adopt, reconcile, or decline.

accounted.description: Source changes resolved by a reconciliation or decline decision.

items.description: Earlier effective source change required first.
Decision accounting for the source change.

repositoryId.description: Repository containing the file at this state.

invocationId.description: Exact tool invocation that caused a semantic command.

items.description: Complete local application chain committed here.

Bounded preview of integration decisions made here.

sourceUri.description: Canonical credential-free identity of the observed external source.

snapshotDigest.description: Semantic-workspace-derived commitment to the normalized imported descriptors.

items.description: Exact native repositories admitted from this snapshot.

authoredByWorkUnitId.description: Work unit that authored this change.

items.description: Source change accounted for by this decision.

digest.description: Content address of the exact invocation request.

startedEventId.description: Trajectory event that started this invocation.

completedEventId.description: Trajectory event that completed this invocation.

triggerMessageId.description: Exact message that triggered this turn.

turnId.description: Turn containing the message, when applicable.

completedEventId.description: Trajectory event that completed this message.

sourceMessageId.description: Original channel message, when the trajectory message was received.

edit.description: Atomically create repositories with their initial files or author exact text, binary, file-create, delete, and mode changes on the working head.

The bounded operation requires a narrower request or page.

A move, copy, create, or import destination is occupied.
